hero.title: Know exactly what you're drinking.
hero.subtext: Research-backed breakdowns of microplastics, plastic leaching, and the glass bottles worth trusting. Every claim cited.
hero.trustLine: Every claim cited. No personal brand — just the data.

footer.promise: The facts and tools to make better hydration choices—so you can trust what you’re drinking and share that confidence with others.
footer.disclosure: We earn a commission when you buy through our links, at no extra cost to you. We only recommend products we believe are genuinely better, based on our research.
